checks.summary: Risk levels are accurate and well-justified across all tasks.
checks.detail: T-002 is correctly classified 'high': hook guard edits require human/sudo due to PROTECTED_GATE_SUFFIXES self-protection, caller update failures would cause runtime breakage for sdd-bootstrap, and old plugin deletion is irreversible. T-001 (docs only, Done), T-003 (4-line additive edits), T-004 (doc restructure), T-005 (test additions + pre-existing bug fix) are all correctly 'low'. No misclassification found.

checks.summary: T-002 is large but justified; all other tasks are appropriately scoped.
checks.detail: T-002 spans 5 phases but splitting it would create intermediate broken states (callers referencing non-existent plugin, guard protecting non-existent paths). The phased structure with an explicit verification gate at Phase 3.5 provides adequate checkpoints without requiring separate tasks. T-003, T-004, T-005 are modest in scope. No task is padded or insufficiently bounded.

checks.summary: Key edge cases are explicitly covered in ACs and task scope.
checks.detail: AC-003 addresses post-deletion guard behavior (old path should pass harmlessly or be irrelevant). AC-009 verifies approval guard integrity is preserved. Python Check 2e bare relative path resolution is explicitly specified (os.listdir with CWD-relative path, _resolve_project_root() explicitly excluded per ADR-004). Scenario 21 covers FAIL-verdict rejection. T-005 Scenario 20 notes the required 'cd $WORK' before guard execution to ensure correct CWD-relative resolution. AC-010 confirms BL-012/BL-013 (install.sh auto-include + marketplace) are unaffected.

checks.summary: Irreversibility is acknowledged and mitigated by Phase 3.5 verification gate.
checks.detail: T-002 Phase 4 (old plugin deletion) is correctly flagged as irreversible. The Phase 3.5 verification gate requires explicit confirmation that the new plugin is complete, callers are updated, and AC-002 is manually verifiable before deletion proceeds. Phase 1/5 human/sudo requirement prevents accidental guard modification. No implicit rollback is needed for T-003/T-004/T-005 (additive/doc changes). The mitigation strategy is appropriate for a refactoring task of this type.

checks.summary: Human/sudo requirements are unambiguous and prominently documented.
checks.detail: The top-level warning box in tasks.md states 'T-002 Phase 1 と Phase 5 は human/sudo セッションが必須' with the technical reason (PROTECTED_GATE_SUFFIXES self-protection). Within T-002 Scope, Phase 1 is labeled '[human/sudo — エージェント不可]' and Phase 5 is labeled '[human/sudo — Phase 4 完了後]'. Both phases have 'Done When' checklist items. No ambiguity about which steps require elevated access.

checks.summary: Workflow assignments match task risk and nature for all tasks.
checks.detail: T-002 uses 'tdd' workflow — appropriate for high-risk code changes (guard modifications, plugin restructuring, caller updates) where tests must be verified at each phase. T-003, T-004, T-005 use 'acceptance-first' — appropriate for lower-risk additive changes (caller header, docs, tests) where writing ACs first then implementing is natural. T-001 is Done (irrelevant). Precheck confirms workflow_match_precheck: PASS.

checks.summary: All ACs map to tasks; Done-When checklists cover all ACs.
checks.detail: AC-001/002/003/004/005/009 → T-002 Done-When. AC-006/007 → T-005 Done-When. AC-008 (BL-010/BL-011 regression) is included in T-002 Done-When ('BL-009/BL-010/BL-011 が pass する') and T-005 Done-When ('BL-009/BL-010/BL-011 が pass する'). AC-010 (BL-012/BL-013) is in T-002 Done-When. No AC is orphaned from a task. The acceptance-tests.md contains 10 ACs (AC-001 through AC-010); all are traceable.

checks.summary: Blocker chain is logically complete and correctly ordered.
checks.detail: T-001: no blockers (first task, establishes baseline). T-002: blocks on T-001 (requires investigation/baseline docs). T-003: blocks on T-002 (Caller header references sdd-ship orchestration context established after plugin restructure). T-004: blocks on T-002 (doc updates reference new plugin names that must exist). T-005: blocks on T-002, T-003, T-004 (final test additions and CHANGELOG after all structural changes are complete). No circular dependencies. No missing upstream dependencies identified.

notes: Round 3 final confirmatory pass. All 8 checks PASS, consistent with Round 2 results. Precheck confirms workflow_match_precheck: PASS and blockers_format_valid: true. No new issues identified. Tasks are well-structured with clear phase sequencing, explicit human/sudo boundaries, and complete AC traceability. The Phase 3.5 verification gate in T-002 is a notable risk-mitigation design that prevents premature irreversible deletion.
